attributes.additional_details: Because women are equal to men in every way and we do the same work
attributes.background: Close gender pay gaps and racial pay gaps

rejection.details:
etitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We understand that you would like to close the gender pay gap, but we are not sure how you wish the government to do that.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do.
